item.description:
New Features

  • Customizable Apple Logo: Personalize the Apple logo in your menu bar with new visual effects and dynamic colors that match your wallpaper.
  • Split View Mode: A beautiful new way to organize your menu bar with animated, separate sections featuring smooth transitions and highlights.
  • GlowBar Animations: Enjoy fluid animations when showing or hiding GlowBar, along with slick transitions when your content appears.

Improvements

  • Smoother Drag & Drop: Organizing your menu bar items is now more stable and precise, especially when moving items between different sections.
  • Refined Layout: The Glow Icon and GlowBar Toggle now stay neatly together, and GlowBar panels always center perfectly below their control items.
  • Updated Themes: The Vibrant and Obsidian appearance presets have been updated to seamlessly integrate with the new Apple logo customizations.
  • Better Performance: Enjoy snappier animations, improved hover interactions, faster app icon refreshing, and enhanced overall stability.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where menu bar icons could appear with incorrect sizing.
  • Resolved layout issues with notification badges to ensure consistent spacing.
  • Fixed a bug where item count badges wouldn't update immediately after dragging items.
  • Ensured the "Always Hidden" section remembers your preferred item positions correctly.
  • Improved accessibility descriptions for screen readers and other assistive tools.
